mapper.select: SELECT d.draft_id, d.title, d.updated_at, (SELECT bi.image_url FROM blog_image_drafts bi WHERE bi.draft_id = d.draft_id AND bi.is_thumbnail = true AND bi.is_deleted = false LIMIT 1) AS thumbnail_url FROM blog_post_drafts d WHERE d.author_id = #{authorId} AND d.status = #{status} AND d.is_deleted = false ORDER BY d.updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT d.draft_id, d.title, d.updated_at, u.display_name AS author_name, (SELECT bi.image_url FROM blog_image_drafts bi WHERE bi.draft_id = d.draft_id AND bi.is_thumbnail = true AND bi.is_deleted = false LIMIT 1) AS thumbnail_url FROM blog_post_drafts d JOIN users u ON d.author_id = u.user_id WHERE d.status = 'PENDING' AND d.is_deleted = false ORDER BY d.updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
